name: capawesome-skills
description: Agent skills for Capawesome, Capacitor, and the Ionic Framework.

plugins.name: capacitor-core
plugins.description: Core Capacitor skills — app creation, development, upgrades, expert reference, and plugin setup.

plugins.name: capacitor-integrations
plugins.description: Capacitor feature integration skills — push notifications (FCM) and in-app purchases.

plugins.name: capacitor-frameworks
plugins.description: Framework-specific Capacitor skills — Angular, React, and Vue patterns and best practices.

plugins.name: capacitor-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Capacitor plugin development skills — create, upgrade, and add SPM support to plugins.

plugins.name: ionic-core
plugins.description: Core Ionic Framework skills — app creation, development, upgrades, and expert reference.

plugins.name: ionic-frameworks
plugins.description: Framework-specific Ionic skills — Angular, React, and Vue patterns and best practices.

plugins.name: capawesome-cloud
plugins.description: Capawesome Cloud skills — CLI setup, native builds, live updates, and app store publishing.

plugins.name: ionic-migrations
plugins.description: Migration skills — migrate from Ionic Appflow and Ionic Enterprise SDK plugins to Capawesome alternatives.
